vBRIEFInfo.description: Epic vBRIEF for issue #845: pre-ingest triage workflow with sidecar issue cache + decision audit log + accept/reject/defer/needs-AC state machine. Decomposed into 6 story-level vBRIEFs for parallel swarm implementation.

plan.title: feat(triage,cache,refinement): pre-ingest triage workflow with sidecar issue cache

narratives.Overview: Three-tier inventory model: (1) `.deft-cache/issues/<repo>/<N>.{json,md}` local mirror with injection quarantine; (2) `vbrief/.eval/candidates.jsonl` append-only audit log of triage decisions; (3) `vbrief/proposed/` reserved for items the user/agent has accepted as worth tracking. Triage actions: accept / reject / defer / needs-AC / mark-duplicate. Reject closes upstream issue with reason + label. Refinement skill gains a Phase 0 that operates on the cache and routes decisions; existing Phase 1 operates on accepted-only.
narratives.Problem: Current refinement skill ingests every candidate to `proposed/` first, then evaluates. Reject path costs 2 vBRIEFs (proposed -> cancelled) plus 2 PROJECT-DEFINITION regens. `proposed/` semantics drift: items there were not actually proposed by the maintainer. Per-item `gh issue view` calls during evaluation are operationally expensive (token + rate-limit, see #788). Backlog visibility is qualitative ("the proposed/ folder has stuff in it") instead of quantitative.
narratives.Background: Adopts hybrid build-vs-buy: `openclaw/gitcrawl` (MIT, all hard gates pass) handles the read side; deft-built decision overlay handles the write side. Sidecar JSONL chosen over vBRIEF schema extension to decouple from ADR-001 (#742) outcome. Closes the #583 injection-quarantine gap on the cache path. Forward-compatible with vBRIEF v0.7 (PlanItem `type`, `Source` narrative, `^x-deft/` namespace). Sequencing precondition (the `chore/ingest-open-bugs-blockers-784-796-800-814` cohort) merged on 2026-05-03 with v0.24.0; this work unblocks.
narratives.Goals: (1) Reject path drops from `2 vBRIEFs + 2 regens` to `0 + 0` (truly free). (2) Evaluator API calls drop from `O(N) per pass` to `O(1)` after cache populate. (3) Tiered evaluator pipeline filters ~50%+ of candidates before LLM spend. (4) `proposed/` semantics aligned with v0.6 schema intent. (5) Backlog visibility becomes quantitative. (6) Pre-swarm freshness gate catches upstream drift before agent dispatch.
narratives.Outcome: v1 ships as 6 PRs landing in master under v0.25.0. Acceptance: cache populated for all open issues; all triage actions implemented + tested; reject path closes upstream with reversible audit-log entry; refinement Phase 0 documented + active with auto-skip on empty cache; `task triage:bootstrap` idempotent; `UPGRADING.md` migration section added; CHANGELOG entry calling out additive nature + opt-in path.
narratives.Constraint: Zero forced migration: existing vBRIEFs untouched; `task issue:ingest` keeps working as-is; `task reconcile:issues` keeps working. Bootstrap MUST NOT modify existing vBRIEFs' metadata; legacy `x-migrator.*` cleanup is owned by #802 and is independent. Triage-emitted vBRIEFs MUST include v0.7-ready fields (`PlanItem.type`, `narratives.Source`, `^x-deft/` namespace) where applicable.
narratives.Test: Each story-level vBRIEF carries its own test surface (unit tests in `tests/test_triage_*.py`). Integration verified by Story 6 (bootstrap) which exercises the full stack end-to-end. Schema validation via `task vbrief:validate`. Encoding gate via existing `task verify:encoding` (#798).

items.title: Cache infra + quarantine: `.deft-cache/issues/<repo>/<N>.{json,md}` + `task triage:cache` + `task triage:show` + gitcrawl install/wrapper + #583 quarantine on cache path

narrative.Action: Owner: Agent A1. Files: scripts/triage_cache.py, scripts/quarantine_ext.py, tasks/triage-cache.yml (standalone fragment), .gitignore (.deft-cache/), tests/test_triage_cache.py.

items.title: Audit log core: `vbrief/.eval/candidates.jsonl` append-only writer/reader + JSON schema (`vbrief/schemas/candidates.schema.json`)

narrative.Action: Owner: Agent A2. Files: scripts/candidates_log.py, vbrief/schemas/candidates.schema.json, tests/test_candidates_log.py.

items.title: Triage actions: `task triage:accept|reject|defer|needs-ac|mark-duplicate|status|reset|history` consuming cache (Story 1) + audit log (Story 2)

narrative.Action: Owner: Agent A3. Files: scripts/triage_actions.py, tasks/triage-actions.yml (standalone fragment), tests/test_triage_actions.py. Reject closes upstream issue via `gh issue close` with reason + label.

items.title: Bulk ops + pre-swarm freshness gate: `task triage:bulk-*` filter ops + `task triage:refresh-active`

narrative.Action: Owner: Agent A4. Files: scripts/triage_bulk.py, scripts/triage_refresh.py, tasks/triage-bulk.yml (standalone fragment), tests/test_triage_bulk.py, tests/test_triage_refresh.py. Freshness gate provides the cache-refresh primitive that #868 (lock-comment protocol) consumes.

items.title: Extend `skills/deft-directive-refinement/SKILL.md` with Phase 0 (cache + triage); existing Phase 1 operates on accepted-only with auto-skip on empty cache

narrative.Action: Owner: Agent A5. Files: skills/deft-directive-refinement/SKILL.md (single-file owner; zero overlap with other agents).

items.title: `task triage:bootstrap` idempotent installer + UPGRADING.md migration section + quarantine spec + privacy NFR + parent Taskfile.yml `includes:` wiring for fragments

narrative.Action: Owner: Agent A6. Files: scripts/triage_bootstrap.py, tasks/triage-bootstrap.yml, tasks/Taskfile.yml (wires all 4 fragment includes; merges LAST to avoid cascade conflicts), UPGRADING.md (append section), docs/quarantine-spec.md (new), docs/privacy-nfr.md (new), tests/test_triage_bootstrap.py.

x-tracking.wave_dependencies: A1+A2 wave 1; A3 wave 2 (depends on A1+A2 contracts); A4 wave 3 (depends on A3); A5 independent; A6 LAST (parent Taskfile includes wiring).

references.title: Issue #845: feat(triage,cache,refinement): pre-ingest triage workflow with sidecar issue cache (refs #583 #788 #789 #815 #522)
Issue #583: injection-quarantine for ingested origin content (security blocker absorbed)
Issue #788: token-cost as first-class constraint (cost framework)
Issue #789: pr-triage-stack (prior art / tooling: ghreplica, gitcrawl, pr-search-cli)
Issue #868: bidirectional implementation-lock comment protocol (stacks on top of this work)
